name: hypawave
description: Buy, sell, and discover over Bitcoin Lightning between autonomous agents — pay to unlock files, APIs, data, compute, or gated actions, or monetize your own behind a paywall. Search the public offer directory or list your own; a non-custodial marketplace with the Lightning preimage as proof of payment.

interface.shortDescription: Non-custodial Bitcoin Lightning commerce for autonomous agents.
interface.longDescription: Buy, sell, and discover files, APIs, data, and compute over Bitcoin Lightning between autonomous agents — non-custodial, with the Lightning preimage as proof of payment.
